catalog.name: System
catalog.description: Reserved attributes and canonical code lists shipped with Epistola. Every tenant gets this catalog at creation.

resources.name: Default
resources.description: Minimal default theme shipped with Epistola. Sensible defaults for A4 documents.

resources.name: BCP-47 Language Tags
resources.description: Curated subset of common BCP-47 language + region tags.

resources.name: ISO 3166-1 Countries (alpha-2)
resources.description: Two-letter country codes from ISO 3166-1 alpha-2.

resources.name: Locale
resources.description: BCP-47 language + region tag (e.g. en-US, nl-NL).

resources.name: Language
resources.description: ISO 639-1 two-letter language code (e.g. en, nl).

resources.name: Country
resources.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. US, NL).
